case_title: HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A. VS. MICHAEL MEDVEDEV et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MEDVEDEV, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-06-2010
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MEDVEDEV, MICHAEL

DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2011 CONTINUED TO OCT-26-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JUL-27-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE
WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FES DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDVEDEV, MICHAEL $4,863.61 PRINCIPAL, $267.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,131.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
